## Contact

::: smallcaps
|  |  |  |
|:---------------------------|:------------------------:|-----------------:|
| [estebandegetau\@gmail.com](mailto:estebandegetau@gmail.com) | [www.estebandegetau.com](https://www.estebandegetau.com) | Mexico City, Mexico |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[34,33,33\]"}
:::

## Education

{{< include education.qmd >}}

## Working Papers

{{< include ../research/working_papers.qmd >}}

## Work Experience

### Research

|  |  |
|:-------------------------------------------------|---------------------:|
| **World Bank** |  |
| Short-term Consultant - Macroeconomics and Growth, Development Research Group, practice to Agustín Samano | 2025 - Present |

|  |  |
|--------------------------------------------------|---------------------:|
| **ITAM** |  |
| Graduate Research Assistant - Center for Economic Research (CIE), practice to Joyce Sadka and Enrique Seira | 2022 - 2023 |

### Public Service

|                                                 |             |
|-------------------------------------------------|------------:|
| **Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social (IMSS)** |             |
| Deputy Head, Fiscal Policy Planning             | 2023 - 2025 |

### Teaching

{{< include ../teaching/classes.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<!-- ### Industry Experience

|                         |      |
|-------------------------|-----:|
| **CEROMULTAS**          |      |
| Senior Business Analyst | 2021 |
| Business Analyst        | 2020 |

|                             |      |
|-----------------------------|-----:|
| **T-Rez Consulting**        |      |
| International Trade Analyst | 2018 | -->
```

## Recognitions

{{< include recognitions.qmd >}}

## Certifications

{{< include certifications.qmd >}}

## Technical Skills

{{< include skills.qmd >}}
